---
title: "Amy Lascelles"
---

## Amy Lascelles

**Dates:** (d. 1888)

### Description

contributor to <i>MP</i> (1879-87)

### Biography

Fifth of the seven daughters of the Hon. Arthur Lascelles (1807-1880), she has an obituary in <i>MP</i> (March 1889).

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
